name: devcynx-theme
description: devcynx — a dark + neon-lime React/Next.js theme for an Odoo developer agency, built on the websites_portal_odoo platform. 15 reusable sections (mega-menu Header, gradient + grid Hero, glowing card grids, dynamic ContactForm, multi-column Footer) with a JetBrains-Mono accented design language. Author: Waqas Riasat.
